description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized stone with a predominantly dark gray coloration and rough, jagged surfaces. The stone features a prominent, slightly concave area on one face, with lighter patches and some white inclusions visible along the edges. Its surface is marked by natural pitting, weathering, and subtle mottling, giving it a rugged, aged appearance. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible artificial modifications or carvings. Its overall form is asymmetrical, with one side broader and flatter, while the opposite side tapers and curves inward. The stone's texture and coloration suggest it has been exposed to the elements for an extended period.
description: A rugged, dark gray stone with jagged edges, mottled surface, and white inclusions, showing signs of natural weathering. Its asymmetrical form and rough texture give it an aged, natural appearance.
description_view_0: The broadest face of the stone is visible, showing a concave area with mottled gray and white patches and a rough, pitted surface.
description_view_1: A narrow, side profile reveals the stone's thickness and a prominent white inclusion near the edge, with less surface detail visible.
description_view_2: The underside or back of the stone is shown, appearing darker and more shadowed, with jagged, uneven edges and less visible patterning.
description_view_3: An angled view highlights the stone's tapering end and the transition from dark to lighter areas, emphasizing its irregular, asymmetrical shape.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle mottling and pitting with irregular white inclusions; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with visible signs of natural weathering and minor surface erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved or manicured surfaces but may blend with natural landscaping stones or gravel.
